meta.description: Single source of truth for Viador Partners. Update after every major session. All platforms and scripts read from this file.

founder.name: Chad Evers
founder.background: Ohio roots — father built small business, started working young, brothers run it today. Started originating loans. 15 years building national DTC mortgage teams — Congressional Bank SVP, BayFirst SVP. 3 years at Citi gaining global institutional experience. Left corporate life to build Viador — the platform the industry should have built for investors years ago.
founder.brand_voice: Conviction over polish. Built for people done waiting for permission. The door is open — we make it simple to walk through. Do it for yourself.

viador_realty.notes: ABA structure — lending + brokerage + title. Katie gets licensed FL + OH. Bring on full time when Y2 revenue justifies salary.
